items.raw_desc: Tusfürdő LACTOVIT Original Tápláló tusfürdő zselé 300 ml:A Lactovit Original tusfürdő erősíti és mélyen táplálja a bőrt a tej jótékony hatásainak köszönhetően, hogy az erős és fiatalos maradjon. Mindezt a vitaminoknak, fehérjéknek és kalciumnak köszönheti. Összetétele 100%-ban természetes tejből származó hatóanyagokat és finom illatot tartalmaz. items.raw_desc: Poroló Surtep kefe/redőnytisztító, mikroszálas, 22 cm, zöld:The Surtep microfiber duster is a unique wet cleaning product, making household cleaning as efficient as possible. A special microfibre combined with polyurethane resin allows for increased efficiency, while this blend of materials provides wear resistance. Microfiber can absorb up to seven times its weight. This amount of dirt is then very easily released when wringing later. The Surtep microfiber duster gets rid of the entire volume of water absorbed, whereas cotton, for example, still retains 30% of the water. The special microfibre material is very easy to wring, dries quickly and effectively prevents the growth of microorganisms. Perfect cleanliness can be achieved in a single stroke, saving cleaning time. However, it is important to ensure that the Surtep microfiber duster is always clean before use. Neutral soap can be used to clean it, but it can also be put in the washing machine. You just need to avoid damaging the material with fabric softener when washing in the washing machine.
